description: schema-crosswalk primitive grammar v1. Source of truth for the primitive set and source arity (design.md 4.1). `arity` is [min, max]; null max means unbounded.

rename_field.summary: Copy a source field to a target field unchanged.

cast_type.summary: Coerce a value to a target scalar type.

normalize_string.summary: Apply an ordered list of enumerated string ops.

arithmetic.summary: Apply an ordered list of enumerated numeric ops with constant operands.

map_enum_value.summary: Map source categoricals to target enum values via lookup table.

concat_fields.summary: Join source fields into one string with a separator.

split_field.summary: Extract one component of a string split by delimiter/regex.

coalesce.summary: First non-null of an ordered list of sources, with optional default.

default_value.summary: Emit a constant, or fill when the optional source is null/missing.

nested_extract.summary: Pull a value from a nested path in a structured source.

nested_flatten.summary: Serialize a nested object/array to a JSON string for a flat target.
